questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. The love between them is blooming.
questions.explanation: D)Blooming(verb) – Flourishing, thriving, growing, prospering. बढ़ता Antonym:Fading(verb) – Waning, diminishing, declining, weakening. लुप्तहोती

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. A professional rider in horse races
questions.explanation: A)Jockey(noun) – A professional rider in horse races. घुड़दौड़ का सवार

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. Rahul was angry of his brother as he broke his pen.
questions.explanation: D) 'angry of' के बदले 'angry with' का use होगा क्योंकि 'angry' के साथ 'with' preposition का use होता है जब किसी व्यक्ति पर गुस्सा व्यक्त किया जाता है; जैसे— She was angry with her friend for lying. 'angry with' will be used instead of 'angry of' because the correct preposition after 'angry' is 'with' when referring to being upset with a person; Like— She was angry with her friend for lying.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. The mountain range looked non-intimidating from afar, but the experienced climbers were undaunted by the challenge.
questions.explanation: B)Non-intimidating(adjective) – Not threatening, harmless, not daunting. गैर-डराने वाला Antonym:Formidable(adjective) – Inspiring fear or respect through being impressively large, powerful, intense, or capable. भयावह, डरावना

questions.question: Parts of a sentence are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the parts in the correct order to form a meaningful sentence. P. and has also created a wide gap between them Q. laid too much stress on R. teachers and students S. online mode of education has
questions.explanation: A)SQRP online mode of education has laid too much stress on teachers and students teachers and students S starts the sentence: “online mode of education has,” which introduces the subject “online mode of education” and the verb “has,” setting up the discussion about its impact. Q follows “S” with: “laid too much stress on,” specifying what the online mode of education has done. This continues the sentence with a clear action. R comes next: “teachers and students,” identifying the groups affected by the stress mentioned. It provides the necessary context for the impact described. P concludes the sentence: “and has also created a wide gap between them,” adding a consequence of the online education mode and completing the thought logically.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. As he is not satisfied / with the jury’s decision, / he appeal / in the higher court.
questions.explanation: B) 'he appeal' के बदले 'he appeals' का USE होगा क्योंकि Subject 'he' Third Person Singular है अत: Verb भी Singular होगी; जैसे— He goes to school every day. 'he appeals' will be used instead of 'he appeal' because the subject 'he' is third person singular, so the verb will also be singular; Like— He goes to school every day.

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. Climbing the steep mountain proved to be a taxing challenge for even the most experienced hikers.
questions.explanation: D) Taxing(adjective) – exhausting, demanding, burdensome, difficult, strenuous थकाने वाला / कठिन Synonym: Strenuous(adjective) – Challenging, tough, strenuous. (थकाने वाला) Easy(adjective) – Simple, effortless, light. (आसान) Relaxing(adjective) – Calming, soothing, peaceful. (आरामदायक) Light(adjective) – Easy, gentle, undemanding. (हल्का)

questions.question: Identify the word that can replace the INCORRECTLY spelt word in the given sentence. The bakery is known for its scrumptous pastries, especially the cinnamon rolls.
questions.explanation: B) The correct spelling of the incorrectly spelt word ‘scrumptous’is ‘scrumptious’, which means “extremely appetizing or delicious” in English. In Hindi, it means “स्वादिष्ट” or “बहुत ही लज़ीज़”.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains an error. I regret / in notify that / the model you want/ is out of stock
questions.explanation: B) 'in notify that' के बदले'to notify that'का use होगा। क्योंकि 'regret' के बाद जब किसी कार्य को करने या सूचना देने की बात हो, तो 'to-infinitive' (जैसे: to notify) का use होता है। उदाहरण: "I regret to inform you that the meeting has been cancelled." 'to notify that' will be used instead of 'in notify that'. This is because after the verb 'regret', when referring to an action that one needs to perform or announce, we use the 'to-infinitive' form (e.g., to notify) Example: "I regret to inform you that the meeting has been cancelled."

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. Overfishing has depleted marine life in many coastal regions.
questions.explanation: D) Deplete(verb) – exhaust, use up, drain, empty, diminish घटाना / समाप्त करना Synonym: Drain(verb) – Use up, exhaust, sap, consume.घटाना / समाप्त करना Replenish(verb) – Fill something up again. फिर से भरना Restore(verb) – Bring back to original condition. पुनर्स्थापित करना Increase(verb) – Become greater in size or amount. बढ़ाना

questions.question: Select the option that rectifies the underlined spelling error. The panel submited the findings to the ministry.
questions.explanation: C) The correct spelling of the underlined word is ‘submitted’, which means “to present or propose something formally for consideration or judgment” (प्रस्तुत करना, सौंपना).

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. An unpleasant mixture of loud sounds.
questions.explanation: D)Cacophony(noun) – An unpleasant mixture of loud sounds कर्कश ध्वनि

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. Over time, the small startup began to morph into a global corporation.
questions.explanation: D) Morph(verb) – transform, change, convert, evolve, shift रूपांतरित होना Synonym: Transform(verb) – Change, convert, morph. (बदलना) Stagnate(verb) – Remain unchanged, idle, stand still. (स्थिर रहना) Halt(verb) – Stop, pause, cease. (रुकना) Shrink(verb) – Reduce, decrease, diminish. (सिकुड़ना)

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. To prime the pump
options: Encourage the growth or action of something'
questions.explanation: B) To prime the pump(idiom) – Encourage the growth or action of something.किसी चीज़ की वृद्धि या क्रिया को प्रोत्साहित करना।

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined words in the given sentence. We rely on Hiren because he is most intelligent than many other boys in our school quiz team.
questions.explanation: C) 'most intelligent' के बदले 'more intelligent' का use होगा क्योंकि Comparative Degree में दो व्यक्तियों या वस्तुओं की तुलना होती है और यहाँ Hiren की तुलना अन्य लड़कों से की जा रही है। 'most intelligent' Superlative Degree में use होता है, जब किसी एक को सभी से श्रेष्ठ बताया जाता है। 'more intelligent' will be used instead of 'most intelligent' because Comparative Degree is used to compare two persons or things, and here Hiren is being compared to other boys. 'Most intelligent' is used in Superlative Degree when someone is described as the best among all.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined idiom. Has he lost his mind? He is falling foul of everybody.
questions.explanation: D)Fall foul of(idiom) – Quarrelling with झगड़ा करना

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Back against the wall
options: Be in an easy situation from where escape is difficult
Be in a difficult situation from where escape is difficult
Be in a relationship which one wants to escape
Be in a difficult situation from where escape is easy
questions.explanation: B) Back against the wall(idiom) – Be in a difficult situation from where escape is difficultऐसी कठिन परिस्थिति में हों जहां से निकलना मुश्किल हो

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Select the option that gives their correct logical sequence. A. India and China, having more than 1 billion people each, are front runners to become superpowers, but India has an edge over China as the latter has an autocratic rule, while India follows democracy. B. Superpower means a super economy that matches demand and supply. C. That is a welfare economy. D. More products mean more industries, employment, supply of currency, healthy people, and education. E. More human development means more purchasing power and more demand for products.
questions.explanation: C) ABEDCA: Paragraph की starting A से होती है, क्योंकि यह बताता है कि भारत और चीन, दोनों 1 बिलियन से अधिक जनसंख्या वाले देश, सुपरपावर बनने की होड़ में हैं, लेकिन भारत का लोकतांत्रिक शासन (democracy) उसे चीन के अधिनायकवादी शासन (autocratic rule) से आगे रखता है।B: इसके बाद B आता है, जो superpower की परिभाषा (definition) बताता है—एक ऐसी महान अर्थव्यवस्था (super economy) जो मांग और आपूर्ति (demand and supply) को संतुलित करती है। यह sentence A में बताए गए विषय की व्याख्या करता है।E: इसके बाद E आता है, जो बताता है कि अधिक मानव विकास (human development) से अधिक खरीद क्षमता (purchasing power) और उत्पादों की अधिक मांग (demand for products) होती है।D: इसके बाद D आता है, जो बताता है कि अधिक मांग (more demand) का परिणाम अधिक उत्पादों (more products) के रूप में होता है, जो अर्थव्यवस्था के विभिन्न क्षेत्रों जैसे उद्योग, रोजगार, मुद्रा की आपूर्ति (supply of currency), स्वस्थ लोग, और शिक्षा को बढ़ावा देता है।C: अंत में C आता है, जो बताता है कि यह पूरा चक्र एक welfare economy कहलाता है।Explanation in EnglishA starts with a clear subject, “India and China,” and introduces the main idea.B follows grammatically as it introduces the term superpower and provides a definition for it. This links directly to the countries mentioned in A, giving a clear explanation of what being a superpower means.E uses a cause-and-effect structure: “More human development means more purchasing power and more demand for products.” This structure is logical after B, as it explains what leads to a super economy.D elaborates on the effect mentioned in E, providing a list of outcomes resulting from more demand. The sequence “more products mean more industries, employment, supply of currency, healthy people, and education” logically follows E.C sums up the entire paragraph with a concluding statement: “That is a welfare economy.” It’s a short, declarative sentence that serves as a conclusion, tying all previous points together.

questions.question: Select the correct option to form a meaningful sentence. As cyber threats (a) / process (b) / evolve, (c) / continue to (d)/ it’s important to (e) / remember cybersecurity (f) / but (g) / task (h) / is not a one-time (i) / ongoing (j) / an (k)
options: a, d, c, e, f, i, h, g, k, j, b
a, d, e, k, f, i, h, b, g, j, c
a, d, b, e, f, i, h, c, g, k, j
a, d, c, e, g, f, i, h, b, k, j
questions.explanation: A) a, d, c, e, f, i, h, g, k, j, b As cyber threats continue to evolve, it’s important to remember cybersecurity is not a one-time task but an ongoing process. a: As cyber threats cyber threats" serves as the subject of the sentence. Starting with "As" introduces a conditional clause. d: "continue to" follows the subject "cyber threats," showing an ongoing action. c: "evolve" completes the thought of what cyber threats are doing, maintaining the logical flow. e: The phrase "it’s important to" begins a new thought, highlighting the significance of cybersecurity in response to the evolving threats. f: remember cybersecurity" follows naturally as the action that is important, in relation to the cyber threats mentioned. i, h: These fragments explain that cybersecurity is not a one-time action g, k, j, b: This part presents the contrast and completes the sentence, stating that cybersecurity is an ongoing process, not a one-time task.

questions.question: Parts of a sentence are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the parts in the correct order to form a meaningful sentence. A. Only for themselves B. Is full of C. People who live D. The world
questions.explanation: A)DBCA The world Is full of People who live Only for themselves D starts the sentence: “The world,” introducing the subject of the sentence. B follows “D” with “is full of,” describing the characteristic of the world and linking to what it is full of. C comes next: “People who live,” specifying the type of people being referred to. A concludes the sentence: “Only for themselves,” describing the people mentioned, completing the idea about the self-centered nature of some individuals in the world.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank: In the realm of literature, words are the (1) ____________ of creation, and authors are the (2) ____________ of meaning. They skillfully weave stories with (3) ____________ narratives that can (4) ____________ the depths of human emotion. A well-crafted novel can (5) ____________ readers into its world, making them forget the passage of time. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1.
questions.explanation: C)Tools'का use यहाँ होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है ऐसे उपकरण या साधन जिनका use किसी चीज़ को हासिल करने के लिए किया जाता है। इस संदर्भ में, शब्दों को साहित्यिक सृजन के उपकरण के रूप में रूपक रूप में संदर्भित किया गया है। यह इस बात को दर्शाता है कि लेखक कैसे शब्दों का use कहानियों को बनाने के लिए करते हैं। 'Isolate' का अर्थ है अलग करना, जो "creation" के संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Convey' का अर्थ है व्यक्त करना या संप्रेषित करना, जो यहाँ पर शब्दों की भूमिका के लिए उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Mundane' का अर्थ है साधारण या नीरस, जो साहित्य की रचनात्मकता के विचार के विपरीत है। 'Tools'will be used here because it refers to instruments or means used to achieve something, and in this context, words are metaphorically referred to as tools for literary creation. This fits the context of how authors use words to craft stories. 'Isolate' means to separate, which does not fit the context of "creation." 'Convey' means to express or communicate, which does not suit the role words play as instruments here. 'Mundane' means ordinary or dull, which is opposite to the idea of creativity in literature.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank: In the realm of literature, words are the (1) ____________ of creation, and authors are the (2) ____________ of meaning. They skillfully weave stories with (3) ____________ narratives that can (4) ____________ the depths of human emotion. A well-crafted novel can (5) ____________ readers into its world, making them forget the passage of time. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: A)'Keepers'का use यहाँ सही है क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है "रक्षक" या "संरक्षक," और इस संदर्भ में लेखक अर्थ के संरक्षक के रूप में वर्णित हैं। बाकी विकल्प इस संदर्भ में फिट नहीं होते। 'Direction' का अर्थ है दिशा, जो यहाँ प्रासंगिक नहीं है। 'Coward' का अर्थ है कायर, जो बिल्कुल भी मेल नहीं खाता। 'Vibrators' इस संदर्भ में पूरी तरह से अनुपयुक्त है। 'Keepers'is the correct choice as it means "guardians" or "protectors," and in this context, authors are described as the keepers of meaning. The other options don't fit in this context. 'Direction' means guidance, which is not relevant here. 'Coward' means someone lacking courage, which is completely irrelevant. 'Vibrators' is entirely inappropriate in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank: In the realm of literature, words are the (1) ____________ of creation, and authors are the (2) ____________ of meaning. They skillfully weave stories with (3) ____________ narratives that can (4) ____________ the depths of human emotion. A well-crafted novel can (5) ____________ readers into its world, making them forget the passage of time. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: B)Vivid'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है "ज्वलंत" या "स्पष्ट और जीवंत"। यह शब्द दर्शाता है कि लेखक की कहानियां इतनी स्पष्ट और प्रभावशाली होती हैं कि वे पाठकों की भावनाओं को गहराई तक छू सकती हैं। यहाँ context में "narratives" का जिक्र है, जो जीवंत और आकर्षक होने चाहिए। जबकि: 'Mundane' का अर्थ है "साधारण या नीरस", जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Defrost' का अर्थ है "जमा हुआ पिघलाना", जो यहाँ बिल्कुल अप्रासंगिक है। 'Convey' का अर्थ है "संदेश या भाव को व्यक्त करना", जो इस संदर्भ में मुख्य विचार को व्यक्त नहीं करता। 'Vivid'will be used because it means "clear, lively, or vibrant." It perfectly conveys the idea that the narratives woven by authors are so striking and impactful that they touch the depths of human emotions. In this context, "narratives" must be vivid to engage readers deeply. Whereas: 'Mundane' means "ordinary or dull," which does not fit here. 'Defrost' means "to thaw something frozen," which is irrelevant to the context. 'Convey' means "to express or communicate an idea," which does not align with the specific intent of "vivid narratives" in this passage.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank: In the realm of literature, words are the (1) ____________ of creation, and authors are the (2) ____________ of meaning. They skillfully weave stories with (3) ____________ narratives that can (4) ____________ the depths of human emotion. A well-crafted novel can (5) ____________ readers into its world, making them forget the passage of time. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4.
questions.explanation: 'A)Pilot'का use सही है क्योंकि इसका अर्थ होता है "किसी चीज़ को सावधानी से संचालित करना या मार्गदर्शन करना।" यह वाक्य इस संदर्भ में फिट बैठता है क्योंकि यह दर्शाता है कि कथाएँ मानवीय भावनाओं की गहराइयों को सावधानीपूर्वक संचालित करती हैं। 'Teacher' का अर्थ है शिक्षक, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Banker' का अर्थ है बैंकर, जो यहां अप्रासंगिक है। 'Sailor' का अर्थ है नाविक, जो यहां भावनाओं के संचालन के लिए उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Pilot'will be used because it means to carefully guide or navigate something. In this context, it fits as it conveys that narratives carefully navigate the depths of human emotion. 'Teacher' means an instructor, which is not relevant here. 'Banker' means someone who works in banking, which is out of context. 'Sailor' means someone who navigates the sea, which is not appropriate for navigating emotions.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank: In the realm of literature, words are the (1) ____________ of creation, and authors are the (2) ____________ of meaning. They skillfully weave stories with (3) ____________ narratives that can (4) ____________ the depths of human emotion. A well-crafted novel can (5) ____________ readers into its world, making them forget the passage of time. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5.
questions.explanation: D)'Immerse'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है "किसी चीज़ में पूरी तरह डूब जाना या उसमें खो जाना।" sentence में कहा गया है कि एक अच्छी तरह से रचित उपन्यास पाठकों को अपनी दुनिया में खींच ले जाता है और उन्हें समय के बीतने का एहसास नहीं होता। यह दर्शाता है कि पाठक उपन्यास की कहानी में पूरी तरह डूब जाते हैं। जबकि: 'Repel' का अर्थ है "दूर करना या विकर्षित करना," जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Isolate' का अर्थ है "अलग-थलग करना," जो यहां फिट नहीं होता। 'Captivate' का अर्थ है "मोहित करना," लेकिन वाक्य का मुख्य उद्देश्य पाठकों को पूरी तरह उपन्यास में डूबा देना है, न कि केवल मोहित करना। Immerse'will be used because it means "to become deeply involved or absorbed in something." The sentence states that a well-crafted novel draws readers into its world, making them lose track of time, which clearly indicates readers are fully immersed in the story. Whereas: 'Repel' means "to drive away or push back," which is incorrect here. 'Isolate' means "to set apart or detach," which doesn't fit the context. 'Captivate' means "to enchant or attract," but the sentence emphasizes complete absorption rather than mere attraction.
